---
title: "Hans Kuthy"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/pic1.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - text: CV
      href: "cv.pdf"
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
